atlas_description: Dyads / triads / CO / DCO / NCO / coefficient-of-coincidence + interchromosomal effects of inversions on meiosis. Consumer of ngsTracts (CO / NCO / DCO classifier over ngsPedigree Stage 3 departure intervals) and of relatedness_atlas products (pedigree_dyads, parent_offspring_edges, family_hubs).

_paired_with._doc: Producer/consumer pair. ngsTracts is the analysis side (STEP_TRC_01 classifier, STEP_TRC_02 traversal breakpoint refiner). The meiosis-atlas is the consumer / browser UI. Also depends on relatedness_atlas (parent_offspring_edges.v1, pedigree_dyads.v1) and inversion_atlas (inversion_candidates.v1, inversion_karyotypes.v1, long_range_haplotype_regimes.v1) per atlas-core/toolkit_registries/relatedness/01_registry/atlases.jsonl.

_round_1_note:
Three pages, organised by biological event class (not by registered product). Each page folds in one or more registered meiosis_atlas products:
  - nco              → ngsTracts NCO + MOSAIC_SHORT + MOSAIC_LONG (gene conversion)
  - crossovers       → ngsTracts CO + DCO, chromosome_meiosis_events.v1, intrachromosomal slice of inversion_meiosis_effects.v1
  - interchromosomal → coincidence_matrix.v1 + local_inv_controls.v1 + family_aware_permutation_design.v1 + interchromosomal slice of inversion_meiosis_effects.v1 (HEADLINE)
All pages are mount/unmount stubs with placeholder result slots; data loaders and compute paths come in a follow-up round once the registered products are actually being produced (registry notes 'missing — builder needed' on 3 of 4 today).

pages.label: NCO
pages.tooltip: Non-crossover / gene-conversion events from ngsTracts (NCO, MOSAIC_SHORT, MOSAIC_LONG). Inside-vs-outside-inversion enrichment is the primary signal.

pages.label: crossovers
pages.tooltip: Meiosis events that are NOT NCO: single and double crossovers (CO + DCO). Per-dyad counts, refined breakpoints (STEP_TRC_02), karyotype-stratified rate.

pages.label: interchromosomal
pages.tooltip: HEADLINE: does a focal inversion's karyotype on chrom X alter meiosis on OTHER chromosomes? Folds coincidence matrix, local controls, family-aware permutation, and interchromosomal effect estimates.

pages.label: crossovers (per candidate)
pages.tooltip: Per-inversion-candidate CO view: sex-specific ideogram (red♀/blue♂), CO-rate vs. relative telomere distance with 95% CI band, optional PRDM9 sequence logo. Keyed by shared.candidate. Migrated 2026-05-19 from genome-atlas page11.
pages._migration_note_2026_05_19: This page was migrated from genome-atlas/pages/annotation/page11 because per-candidate CO views are meiosis content, not genome-assembly content. It uses the `.ga-*` CSS namespace from genome.css — declared explicitly via `stylesheet` here so the router loads that file when this page mounts (cross-atlas dependency: meiosis-atlas pages depend on genome-atlas's stylesheet being available).

pages.label: NCO / GC (per candidate)
pages.tooltip: Sister page to crossovers_per_candidate, same per-inversion-candidate keying. Green NCO + yellow gene-conversion tract ideogram and tract-rate vs. relative telomere distance curves. Driven by nco_gc_track. Migrated 2026-05-19 from genome-atlas page12.
pages._migration_note_2026_05_19: Same migration as crossovers_per_candidate — moved out of genome-atlas because NCO/GC tracts are meiosis content. Uses .ga-* CSS namespace, loaded via `stylesheet` field.

pages.label: observables
pages.tooltip: Meiotic crossover observables. Single CO (r1, r2), double CO (r12), coefficient of coincidence C, interference I = 1 - C. Documents the d / x identifiability limitation: from offspring genotype data alone the precondition probability d and exchange probability x are not separable.
pages._migration_note_2026_05_23: Migrated from relatedness-atlas/atlases/relatedness/pages/hub/meiosis.{html,js} (Phase 1b 2026-05-23). Shares the relatedness state singleton via cross-atlas imports (`../../../relatedness/shared/state.js`); the page operates on the same pedigree-derived evidence as the other relatedness hub pages but its content is meiosis-flavored. Renamed label from 'meiosis' to 'observables' so it doesn't collide with the meiosis atlas's own identity in the topbar.

pages.label: eligibility (p map)
pages.tooltip: Eligibility (p map) — per-window NCO/Mb across one chromosome. NCO traces the precondition / DSB substrate layer; high NCO = plentiful substrate, low NCO = ancient cold region. Inversion footprints overlaid. Karyotype matrix surfaced below.
pages._migration_note_2026_05_23: Migrated from relatedness-atlas/atlases/relatedness/pages/hub/eligibility.{html,js} (Phase 1b 2026-05-23). Reads relatedness state via cross-atlas imports.

pages.label: resolution (x map)
pages.tooltip: Resolution (x map) — per-window CO/(NCO+CO) share. Closest visible proxy for the latent exchange probability x. Inside an active heterokaryotypic inversion: resolution drops sharply while NCO is preserved (Eligibility page).

pages.label: coincidence (C map)
pages.tooltip: Coincidence — 2D per-window-pair heatmap of C = r12 / (r1*r2) for one chromosome (Sandler interference map). C ~ 1 = independence; C < 1 = positive interference (the normal pattern); C >> 1 = negative interference (usually artefact). Click any cell to inspect the pair.
pages._migration_note_2026_05_23: Migrated from relatedness-atlas (Phase 1b 2026-05-23). Distinct from the interchromosomal page (which is multi-chromosome). This page is single-chromosome window-pair coincidence.

pages.label: inversion signature
pages.tooltip: Inversion signature — three stacked tracks for one chromosome (NCO/Mb, CO/meiosis, resolution) plus per-candidate verdict cards. Cross-layer rule: NCO ~ flank + CO suppressed = consistent with active inversion; CO not suppressed = reject; both low = ancient cold region; NCO elevated = ambiguous.
pages._migration_note_2026_05_23: Migrated from relatedness-atlas (Phase 1b 2026-05-23). Reads eligibility + resolution + crossover tracks per chromosome.

pages.label: inv x meiosis scan
pages.tooltip: Focal inversion x meiosis coincidence scan. For each focal inversion, compares the coefficient of coincidence on every tested chromosome between carriers and matched non-carriers, using a family-aware permutation null. Per-row intra/inter relation tag + status pill (strong / moderate / weak / no effect / FAMILY CONFOUNDED).
pages._migration_note_2026_05_23: Migrated from relatedness-atlas/atlases/relatedness/pages/hub/focal_meiosis_scan (Phase 1b 2026-05-23). The page's own tooltip already labelled it 'Transient home: seed page of the future Meiosis Atlas' — this completes that planned move. Sister to the interchromosomal page but per-focal-inversion instead of cohort-level.

_shared_modules_doc: Moved from relatedness-atlas/shared/ on 2026-05-23 (Phase 1b cleanup). recomb_data + recomb_track + inversion_meiosis are pure meiosis logic; relatedness no longer ships them. The modules still cross-import relatedness/shared/utils.js + demo_data.js because those are the canonical shared singletons.
_stylesheets_doc: meiosis.css was extracted from relatedness.css on 2026-05-23 (Phase 1b cleanup). Contains the .meiosis-* / .recomb-* / .fms-* class groups consumed by the 6 migrated meiosis pages. Loaded by the shell on every meiosis-atlas page mount.

server._doc: Meiosis Atlas does NOT ship its own server binary — it consumes the atlas-core unified server (atlas-core/server/atlas_server.py). No compute_endpoints registered yet; pages run as stubs until the meiosis products are being produced.

stages.label: meiosis hub
stages._doc: Single hub stage. Mirrors the relatedness-atlas hub stage convention.

cross_atlas._doc: In/out adapter declaration. Meiosis consumes relatedness (family + trio + inheritance) + inversion (karyotypes + regimes) + diversity (theta_pi for CO density modelling). Publishes the crossover track that genome + inversion read back.

imports.purpose: Per-candidate karyotype assignments for the interchromosomal effects analysis.
Trio + dyad identification (PO edges, FS pairs) from pairwise relationship classification.
Per-chromosome QC + inheritance flags from ngsPedigree Stage 2/3. Required input to ngsTracts CO/DCO/NCO classifier; also flags chromosomes to skip.
Centromere position — required for CO-density model (CO suppression near centromere).
Per-chromosome diversity rollup. Background theta_pi for the CO-density null model.

exports.purpose: Per-window CO density. Genome's page_chromosome_overview embeds it as a sub-track; inversion's local_pca_dosage overlays it on the scrubber. Originally lived in genome-atlas; moved out 2026-05-19 (keyed by candidate, not by assembly feature).
PRDM9 binding motif track. Genome page_chromosome_overview overlay.
Coefficient-of-coincidence matrix. HEADLINE export — quantifies interchromosomal effects of inversions on meiosis.
Per-inversion meiosis effects (intra + inter chromosomal). Inversion embeds it on candidate_focus; evolution reads it as feature on archaeology_card.
Per-chromosome event list (CO / DCO / NCO classified).
